description: Design-review engine for discovery questions, sandbox architecture playouts, and machine-readable design certificates.

task_description.source: user prompt or start-skill discovery context

design-options.json.source: generated high-risk design options passed to dynosdream.py

targeted_questions.description: 3-5 focused discovery questions that expose hidden complexity or missing constraints

design-certificates.json.description: Machine-readable design certificates for vetted options with result, metrics, security score, and recommendation

design-decisions.md.description: Human-readable summary of vetted options, observed failure modes, and preferred recommendation
